provenance: Invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing. Oak is the named fuel of the ARCHITECTURE section 11 Tavern Fire trace ('diffusion heats oak past ignition on the frontier').
notes: ignitionK 550 K approximates real wood autoignition (~570 K). Slower to ignite and much longer-burning than thatch (550 K vs 450 K; 1800 vs 240 fuelTicks) per the assignment ordering. ignitionK + fuelTicks = 2350 <= 4095 under either parse of the fuel invariant.
